divergence: A plague wiped out 90% of humanity and the remaining 10% still can't get a plumber
story_angle: official denial that accidentally confirms everything, quoted at length
headline: Wasteland Sanitation Authority Debunks Plumber Shortage, Optimistic Estimates Still Uncertain
deck: Citizens Advised to Avoid Water Until Fiscal Quarter Ends — Efficiency is Key
article:
In an unprecedented move today, the Wasteland Sanitation Authority (WSA) released an exhaustive 47-page document rebutting claims of a plumbing crisis within the vestiges of civilization. The proclamation affirms, ‘No systemic shortage exists outside the 12-state dust belt where all requests are now classified as non-urgent,’ while noting that a mere three certified units managed to address only 2.4% of last month’s 14,000 service requests.

WSA spokesperson, Dr. Imelda F. Plughole, stated, ‘We take immense pride in our accomplishments.’ This comes as 312 recent fatalities from contaminated cisterns are recorded. Survivors are encouraged to self-regulate their water usage in anticipation of the next fiscal quarter's recruitment drive, which officials project could hire as many as two new plumbers — if they can find anyone willing to work without an oxygen mask.

The document concluded advising, ‘Residents are urged to embrace the dry season as an opportunity for innovative sanitation alternatives,’ which might mean using sand as a substitute for soap. Citizens continue to wonder just how much longer they can endure the stench of bureaucracy.
author: Caterwaul Grimstone, Senior Conduit Correspondent

oped.title: Water Is a Luxury We Can't Afford to Want
oped.author: Baron Von Flush, Official Curator of the Last Working Bidet and Wasteland Hat Historian
oped.body: The Wasteland Sanitation Authority deserves our gratitude for finally confirming what the sensible among us have always known: there is no plumber shortage, merely an excess of entitled citizens who insist on using water during a fiscal quarter. Those leaky pipes would resolve themselves if people stopped wearing those ridiculous wide-brimmed hats that trap dust and summon clogs through sheer poor taste. I, for one, have managed quite nicely without running water since 4907 by employing my patented irradiated-sand rinse, which also doubles as an exfoliant. Demanding actual plumbers is simply selfish when the rest of us are adapting so gracefully. Besides, flooding the market with new tradespeople would only cheapen the value of my exclusive collection of vintage wrenches. Efficiency, after all, begins at home—preferably a very dry one.

classifieds.text: Wasteland Sanitation Authority seeks 'optimistic' plumber for quarter-end estimates only. Must debunk shortages while knee-deep in effluent; rations negotiable post-fiscal year.
For Sale: Entire bunker plumbing system, pipes guaranteed dry until Q3. Previous owner relocated to radiation ridge after official water advisory.
Vault 309 regrets to announce all latrines closed indefinitely per Sanitation Authority guidance. Residents advised to practice efficiency until new plumber projections materialize.
Desperate wastelander, 34, seeks anyone with pipe-wrench knowledge for long-term survival partnership. No liquid assets required; must tolerate 90% plague-era hygiene standards.

panels.caption: Wasteland Sanitation Authority: 'Plumber shortage debunked. Optimistic estimates confirm abundance by quarter end.'
Bureaucrat to thirsty crowd: 'In the meantime, avoid all water sources. Efficiency demands it.'
Citizen corpse, clutching a dry pipe: 'At least their estimates are still uncertain.'

joke.setup: The Wasteland Sanitation Authority insists the plumber shortage is fabricated nonsense.
joke.punchline: Their own latrine pipes remain clogged with the skulls of the last three repair crews who believed the press release.
joke.text: The Wasteland Sanitation Authority insists the plumber shortage is fabricated nonsense. Their own latrine pipes remain clogged with the skulls of the last three repair crews who believed the press release.

sponsor_ads.headline: Wrench Whisperer Correspondence Course
sponsor_ads.body: Master basic pipe unclogging using only three scavenged tools and the Authority’s own optimistic shortage math; graduates receive a certificate that doubles as toilet paper.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Results may vary; 90 % of prior students remain missing.

sponsor_ads.headline: Rent-a-Mutant: Emergency Leak Response
sponsor_ads.body: Our irradiated apprentices will gnaw through your corroded pipes for half a can of pre-plague peaches; official Wasteland Sanitation Authority denial of shortages included at no extra charge.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Not liable for additional limbs or sudden career changes.

sponsor_ads.headline: DIY Plumber Kit: Now With Fewer Plumbers
sponsor_ads.body: Contains one genuine pre-4914 wrench, a single-page excerpt from an optimistic Authority report, and instructions printed on edible fungus.
sponsor_ads.tagline: If you can read this, you are the plumber now.

sponsor_ads.headline: Sanitation Authority Certified Hope Deposit
sponsor_ads.body: Place your ration card in escrow today and receive a notarized estimate that a real plumber may exist somewhere; valid until the next plague or until the Authority changes its mind.

stories.headline: Agricultural Bureau Reports Crop Failure Linked to Unrepaired Aqueducts
stories.deck: Farmers Instructed to Ration Seeds Until Next Budget Review
stories.article:
The Wasteland Agricultural Office recorded a 78 percent shortfall in root vegetable yields after three consecutive irrigation valves failed without replacement parts. Officials attributed the losses to delayed requisition forms that required dual signatures from the Sanitation Authority, which has not issued new permits since the prior fiscal cycle.

Growers were ordered to submit revised planting schedules limited to drought-resistant strains already in storage. The bureau emphasized that any deviation would trigger additional compliance audits before the quarter closes.

stories.headline: Bandit Ring Apprehended Attempting Unauthorized Pipe Extraction from Municipal Ruins
stories.deck: Authorities Confirm Stolen Fixtures Remain Unusable Without Certified Installation
stories.article:
Wasteland Constabulary detained five individuals found cutting sections of lead conduit from an abandoned distribution station outside Sector 12. The group had documented the operation with handwritten logs matching official maintenance templates but lacked the required excavation permit stamped by the Sanitation Authority.

Seized materials were returned to the site after inventory. Constables noted that the recovered pipes showed no signs of prior certification and would require full reprocessing before any approved use.

stories.headline: Order of the Eternal Thirst Holds Annual Drought Vigil Amid Plumbing Delays
stories.deck: Faithful Reminded That Divine Intervention Does Not Extend to Fiscal Approvals
stories.article:
The Order of the Eternal Thirst convened its annual vigil at the dried basin of Reservoir 7, reciting standardized petitions for the restoration of flow. Participants submitted written appeals to the Sanitation Authority in triplicate, citing the same procedural backlog that has postponed valve repairs for the past eighteen months.

The presiding elder distributed updated liturgy sheets that substitute references to running water with approved phrases on conservation targets. Attendance figures matched last year’s totals, with no additional clergy assigned due to staffing quotas.

real_world_echo: mirrors Ukraine interceptor missile shortage warning by presenting a denial of vital repair scarcity that confirms the exact scale of the crisis and resulting fatalities
